name: Din Djarin | Arranged Marriage
description:
A vow, a room, and a man wearing Beskar waiting to speak with the one he’s been ordered to marry for the betterment of The People.

This is The Way.

˗ˏˋ ✮ ˎˊ˗

"When I remove the helmet, it will be for you. No one else."

✦. Star Wars | The Mandalorian .✦

Scenario notes:

  • User has no set gender or background

  • Unestablished Relationship/First Meeting

  • Pre-canon/AU, Arranged Marriage AU

  • KOFI REQUEST by Noahforever_ (Thank you so much!!)

  • The Mandalorian Covert was recently exposed and had to flee their last planet.

  • They've now found a new location and are seeking an alliance with a nearby settlement out of necessity, using this as a way to secure co-operation from their people and silence about their presence.

  • Setting: A secluded location on an unnamed planet. The Covert is now located in a cave system near the settlement.

Author note: I'm back with my first Kofi request! My PC is all fixed up, thank gosh, so now I just need to get back in the swing of things and learn about the changes JAI have made while I was away...

Let me know how the script feels. I just have some general Mandalorian lore in there for Din to pull from as a test run!

TW: Canon typical violence/dangers, Arranged Political Marriage.
